stages.name: Bootstrap · from zero to usable
stages.goal: empty repo → one provider + one model + passing hello-world chat
stages.preconditions: gateway router present + provider/model meta tools registered
dod: /gateway renders provider + model create forms
POST /api/providers + /api/models create real rows
chat_test_model exercises a real LLM call (streaming + usage numbers)
first chat in /chat streams a response

stages.name: Self-build an employee (chat only)
stages.goal: in /chat, Lead creates an employee via create_employee meta tool; /employees list reflects it + result renders as EmployeeCard
stages.preconditions: employee meta tool + EmployeeCard render component registered
dod: create_employee meta tool present + scope=WRITE + requires_confirmation=True
Lead invokes create_employee; confirmation card renders
post-confirm, /employees list has the new row
EmployeeCard render component registered → result shows inline in chat

stages.name: Self-dispatch a task (fire-and-forget)
stages.goal: /chat → Lead calls tasks_create → /tasks shows row → status walks queued → running → completed; artifact produced
stages.preconditions: tasks spec merged (migration 0011) + /tasks route + tasks meta tools
dod: tasks_create meta tool with DoD-mandatory schema registered
POST /api/tasks + GET /api/tasks list + status enum covers queued/running/completed/failed/cancelled
/tasks + /tasks/[id] routes render
task result publishes an artifact

stages.name: Build a trigger + fire it
stages.goal: Lead calls create_trigger → /triggers has row → manual fire_trigger_now → fire row + agent response visible
stages.preconditions: triggers spec delivered + events table + cockpit/fires UI
dod: create_trigger meta tool present + scope=WRITE
POST /api/triggers + /triggers/:id/fire work
fire_trigger_now produces a fire row visible at /triggers/[id]
agent response to the fire shows up in /cockpit activity

stages.name: Artifacts live push (chat → panel)
stages.goal: Lead writes an artifact via artifact_create → ArtifactPanel in /chat updates in realtime without refresh
stages.preconditions: artifact_changed SSE event wired (blocked by I-0005)
dod: artifact_create meta tool registered + scope=WRITE
execution/events.py emits artifact_changed
services/artifact_service.py publishes on create/update
web ArtifactPanel subscribes to /api/artifacts/stream (or /api/events) and re-renders

stages.name: External channel roundtrip (inbound → reply → outbound)
stages.goal: External channel webhook → conversation auto-created → Lead replies → channel outbound delivery
stages.preconditions: notification-channels spec merged (Wave 2 Track 3) + channel inbound webhook handler
dod: register_channel + test_channel meta tools registered
POST /api/channels/:id/webhook accepts inbound messages
inbound creates a conversation + routes to Lead
Lead reply triggers send_notification on the same channel

stages.name: Stock assistant end-to-end (market anomaly → trigger → channel)
stages.goal: Market data poller detects anomaly → trigger fires → stock briefing produced → notification sent via channel
stages.preconditions: Wave 2 stock-assistant merged (market-data + channels + triggers joined)
dod: market poller surfaces anomalies (/api/market/anomalies or equivalent)
trigger on anomaly fires generate_briefing
briefing artifact produced + delivered via send_notification
/stock-assistant/setup wizard runs end-to-end in a fresh install

north_star_dims.N1: Tool-First redemption: CRUD only via chat
north_star_dims.N2: One-screen decision: parent + key child visible together
north_star_dims.N3: Test is end-to-end: test button exercises the real thing
north_star_dims.N5: Test parity: test UI == production UI
north_star_dims.N6: Recoverable failure: empty/error states guide next step
